tests.title: the source↔preview jump from a node line targets THAT node's rendered element (a different node line targets a different element), and a source edit + re-sync updates the preview model
errors: Error: TauriPage command 'eval' failed: window.__PPE_E2E__.placeCursorOnTikzNodeLine is not a function. (In 'window.__PPE_E2E__.placeCursorOnTikzNodeLine("alpha")', 'window.__PPE_E2E__.placeCursorOnTikzNodeLine' is undefined)
